title: Senior Frontend Developer at Lybrate International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Lybrate International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lybrate International Enterprises family as a Frontend Developer in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lybrate International Enterprises:
Lybrate International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate International Enterprises!
